title: symphyotrichum × columbianum
intro: Symphyotrichum × columbianum, also known as Columbia aster or Columbia white goldenrod, is a hybrid plant species in the aster family, native to the Pacific Northwest region of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Symphyotrichum × columbianum include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, which can be used to alleviate various health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
